index.title: TODO [fr] Second Chance — Foundational courses
index.heading: TODO [fr] It's never too late to learn.
index.lead: TODO [fr] You may not have had the chance at education you deserved — but that chance isn't gone. These short courses are a way to grow your confidence, discover your strengths, and learn things you can use in your own life — at your own pace, on your own phone, wherever you are.
index.learnMore: TODO [fr] Learn more about these courses
index.lang.heading: TODO [fr] Choose your language
index.lang.hint: TODO [fr] English is available now. More languages are coming soon.
index.help.heading: TODO [fr] New to online learning?
index.help.lead: TODO [fr] These short guides explain everything — there's nothing you need to know in advance.
courses.title: TODO [fr] Courses
courses.heading: TODO [fr] Choose a course
courses.lead: TODO [fr] Four short courses. Take them in any order — each one stands on its own.
courses.empty: TODO [fr] Courses will appear here soon.
course.title: TODO [fr] Course
course.progress.heading: TODO [fr] Your progress
course.notfound.title: TODO [fr] Course not found
course.notfound.body: TODO [fr] We couldn't find that course. It may have moved.
course.oneSitting.title: TODO [fr] Best done in one sitting
course.oneSitting.body: TODO [fr] These courses work best when you complete a full course in one sitting where you can. Each module takes about 30 minutes, and the modules build on each other — doing them together keeps your momentum and helps the ideas stick. Your progress is saved on the device you're using, but completing in one go is the surest way not to lose your place: if you switch phones, clear your browser, or come back after a long break, a saved spot can sometimes be lost. If you can't finish a whole course at once, that's okay — just try to finish each module you start before stopping.
course.complete.title: TODO [fr] You've finished this course
course.complete.body: TODO [fr] Every module is done — wonderful work. Collect your certificate whenever you're ready.
launch.title: TODO [fr] Opening your module
launch.heading: TODO [fr] Your module is loading
launch.placeholder: TODO [fr] Your module will open here.
launch.note: TODO [fr] Keep this page open while you work through the module. It is marked done automatically when you finish.
launch.shared.title: TODO [fr] Sharing this device?
launch.shared.body: TODO [fr] If you share this device with someone else who is also taking Second Chance courses, only do that if each of you can finish a course in one sitting. The device saves your progress, but it can't tell two people apart — so if you stop partway and someone else starts, your saved progress can get mixed up or lost.
launch.stub.note: TODO [fr] Course player coming in the next step. For now this is a placeholder.
launch.started: TODO [fr] Module started. Work through it, then finish it to complete.
launch.completed.title: TODO [fr] Module complete!
launch.completed.body: TODO [fr] Nicely done. Your progress has been saved on this device.
launch.unavailable.title: TODO [fr] This module isn't ready yet
launch.unavailable.body: TODO [fr] The content for this module is being added. Please check back soon — and try another module in the meantime.
launch.error.title: TODO [fr] We couldn't open this module
launch.error.body: TODO [fr] Something went wrong while loading the module. Please check your connection and try again.
launch.englishModules: TODO [fr] The course modules are in English.
launch.fullscreenHint: TODO [fr] Exit fullscreen when you reach the last slide to continue.
launch.fullscreenDoneHint: TODO [fr] Module complete — exit fullscreen to continue.

complete.body: TODO [fr] You've completed the course. That's a real achievement — well done.

complete.country.hint: TODO [fr] Optional, and anonymous — it only helps us count how many people the programme reaches, by country.

howto.title: TODO [fr] How it works
howto.heading: TODO [fr] How it works
howto.lead: TODO [fr] Six simple steps. There's nothing to set up and nothing to remember.
howto.step1.title: TODO [fr] Choose your language
howto.step1.body: TODO [fr] Pick the language you'd like to learn in. English is ready now; more are coming.
howto.step2.title: TODO [fr] Open a course
howto.step2.body: TODO [fr] Browse the courses and tap one to open it. You can take them in any order.
howto.step3.title: TODO [fr] Tap a module to start
howto.step3.body: TODO [fr] Each course has one or more short modules. Tap one to begin — each takes about 30 minutes.
howto.step4.title: TODO [fr] Work through it
howto.step4.body: TODO [fr] Move through the module at your own pace. You'll need an internet connection while it's open.
howto.step5.title: TODO [fr] It's marked done when you finish
howto.step5.body: TODO [fr] When you reach the end of a module, it's marked complete automatically — nothing to press.
howto.step6.title: TODO [fr] Finish all modules for your certificate
howto.step6.body: TODO [fr] Complete every module in a course and you can make a certificate with your name on it.
tips.title: TODO [fr] Tips
tips.heading: TODO [fr] Tips for getting the most from the courses
tips.oneSitting.title: TODO [fr] Finish a course in one sitting where you can
tips.oneSitting.body: TODO [fr] These courses work best when you complete a full course in one sitting where you can. Each module takes about 30 minutes, and the modules build on each other — doing them together keeps your momentum and helps the ideas stick. Your progress is saved on the device you're using, but completing in one go is the surest way not to lose your place: if you switch phones, clear your browser, or come back after a long break, a saved spot can sometimes be lost. If you can't finish a whole course at once, that's okay — just try to finish each module you start before stopping.
tips.shared.title: TODO [fr] Sharing a device
tips.shared.body: TODO [fr] If you share this device with someone else who is also taking Second Chance courses, only do that if each of you can finish a course in one sitting. The device saves your progress, but it can't tell two people apart — so if you stop partway and someone else starts, your saved progress can get mixed up or lost.
tips.phone.title: TODO [fr] Made for your phone
tips.phone.body: TODO [fr] Everything is designed to work well on a phone. You can hold it upright and read comfortably; the buttons are large and easy to tap.
tips.data.title: TODO [fr] A note on data
tips.data.body: TODO [fr] You only use mobile data while a module is open. The rest of the site is very light, so it loads quickly even on a slow connection.
faq.title: TODO [fr] FAQ
faq.heading: TODO [fr] Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: TODO [fr] Do I need an account or password?
faq.a1: TODO [fr] No. Just open a course and start.
faq.a2: TODO [fr] Yes — the site never asks for your name or email, and nothing identifies you.
faq.q3: TODO [fr] Will my progress be saved?
faq.a3: TODO [fr] Yes, on the device you're using. For best results, finish a course in one sitting.
faq.q4: TODO [fr] Can I use my phone?
faq.a4: TODO [fr] Yes — the courses are designed for phones.
faq.q5: TODO [fr] Do I need internet the whole time?
faq.a5: TODO [fr] You need a connection to open and work through a course.
faq.q6: TODO [fr] What do I get at the end?
faq.a6: TODO [fr] A certificate you can save or print.
faq.q7: TODO [fr] Can I do the courses in my language?
faq.a7: TODO [fr] English is available now; more languages are coming.
contact.title: TODO [fr] Contact
contact.heading: TODO [fr] Getting in touch
contact.lead: TODO [fr] You don't need to contact anyone to use the courses — everything works on its own. But if you'd like to reach out, you can. It's entirely your choice.
contact.outbound: TODO [fr] This site doesn't collect messages or your contact details. You only reach out if and when you decide to.
contact.tbd: TODO [fr] Contact details for each country will be listed here soon.
why.title: TODO [fr] Why these courses
why.lead.heading: TODO [fr] A second chance to learn
why.lead.p1: TODO [fr] Many women miss out on education, and the reasons are rarely their own doing. Families with too little money. The expectation that a girl looks after the home. Marriage or children arriving early. A school too far away, or not safe to reach. Or simply being told that learning wasn't meant for them. These aren't just unlucky turns in one life — they are barriers built into how societies have long treated women and girls.
why.lead.p2: TODO [fr] That matters, because it means the door was closed to you, not by you. And a door closed by circumstance can be opened again. These courses are built on a simple idea: the chance you were denied is still yours to take. You can learn, grow, and decide for yourself what comes next — starting from exactly where you are today.
why.what.heading: TODO [fr] Made for real life
why.what.p: TODO [fr] These are short, self-paced courses you can do on your own phone, in your own time. They don't expect you to have studied before. And they're built to do something most training skips over — help you build the confidence and self-belief that make everything else possible, whether that's finding work, starting something of your own, returning to study, or simply feeling more sure of your own voice.
why.courses.heading: TODO [fr] The courses
why.courses.welcome.desc: TODO [fr] A short introduction to how everything works, so you feel comfortable before you begin.
why.courses.personal-growth.desc: TODO [fr] Get to know your own strengths, talents, and goals, and grow your confidence in making decisions and speaking up for yourself.
why.courses.gender.desc: TODO [fr] Understand the unwritten rules about how women and men are "supposed" to be, how they've shaped your life, and how things can change.
why.courses.leadership.desc: TODO [fr] Discover the leader in yourself, and the power of women working together to change things — for themselves, their families, and their communities.
why.close.heading: TODO [fr] Every step is yours
why.close.p: TODO [fr] Each course is built around real life — your strengths, your choices, the things that have held you back, and what's possible next. You don't have to do them all, or do them in order. Start with whatever speaks to you, and go at your own pace. Every step is yours.
course.welcome.title: TODO [fr] Welcome
course.welcome.desc: TODO [fr] Start here — a short, friendly tour of how the courses work and what's ahead.
course.personal-growth.title: TODO [fr] Personal Growth
course.personal-growth.desc: TODO [fr] Build confidence, self-awareness, and a clearer sense of what's possible for you.
course.gender.title: TODO [fr] Gender
course.gender.desc: TODO [fr] Understand gender, your rights, and the roles we're taught — and question them.
course.leadership.title: TODO [fr] Leadership
course.leadership.desc: TODO [fr] Find your voice, make decisions, and lead in your own way — at home or in your community.
